---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sachncs
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Research Alignment

How does this feature align with the educational and research mission of the project?

- [ ] Advances cryptographic education
- [ ] Improves performance for research workloads
- [ ] Enhances documentation or tooling
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Technical Details

If applicable, provide:
- Mathematical background or references
- Performance implications
- API design suggestions
- Configuration requirements

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's research-focused mission
- [ ] I have provided sufficient technical detail
